title: Mudhai Devi temple
tagline: Mudhai Devi temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mudhai Devi temple is a temple of goddess Mudhai built as a Hemadpanti structure in village Waghali, in Chalisgaon tehsil of Jalgaon district in Khandesh region of Maharashtra, Ind
overview.description: Mudhai Devi temple is a temple of goddess Mudhai built as a Hemadpanti structure in village Waghali, in Chalisgaon tehsil of Jalgaon district in Khandesh region of Maharashtra, India. Due to its archaeological importance, the Archaeological Survey of India declared this temple as a monument of national importance in 1914.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mudhai Devi temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mudhai Devi temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mudhai Devi temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jalgaon Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Aurangabad Railway Station (73 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mudhai Devi temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mudhai Devi temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mudhai Devi temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mudhai Devi temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
